summary: NG=F is trading essentially at fair value ($2.916 vs $2.923 fair, front/next spreads both tagged FAIR inside a $2.423-$3.423 band), and the seasonality signal is only mildly bearish for the next 3-4 weeks (38% probability higher, typical 4-week move -1.4%) with reliability explicitly flagged Low (59pp spread), so it should not be weighted heavily.
